reviews.review_description: 9 euro wasted money - period - some AI generated images and a narrator voice - the developer BLOCKED filming inside his app - not a very clever move if people want to film inside the app - you cannot move inside the VISTA - it is basically a 2D slide show and nothing more - looked promising but a huge dissapointment - ONE star is even to much

developer_response.body:
We’re sorry that the application didn’t meet your expectations. Our goal was to create an experience around Neuschwanstein and Ludwig II. that is both highly accessible and grounded in solid, well-researched content.
It’s also important to clarify the context: this is intentionally not a traditional game, but a knowledge-based application focused on conveying an authentic sense of space along with meaningful historical background.
All 3D scenes were independently reconstructed based on historical plans and sources and can be explored freely and interactively. In some educational scenes, AI-assisted visuals are used as a complement. These were developed with great care to enhance detail and visual quality without compromising historical authenticity.
Freedom of movement and interaction may be perceived differently depending on the scene. In the 3D interior spaces, free real-time navigation is possible. There, users can access targeted information. We are continuously expanding these interactive features.
Regarding the capture function, we have already addressed and fixed this issue.
Thank you again for your feedback. It helps us continue to improve the application.

VR-Dynamix Development Team
